sb_prompt: WHAT KIND OF CAR DO YOU THINK YOU MIGHT BUY NEXT?  WHAT SORTS OF THINGS WILL ENTER INTO YOUR DECISION?  SEE IF YOUR REQUIREMENTS AND THE OTHER CALLER'S REQUIREMENTS ARE SIMILAR.
raw_output:
ParticipantA: Hello!
ParticipantB: Hello!

ParticipantA: So, what kind of car are you thinking of buying next?
ParticipantB: Well, I've been considering getting a truck.
ParticipantA: A truck, huh? What kind of truck are you looking at?
ParticipantB: Something with good towing capacity. I like the idea of being able to haul stuff around.
ParticipantA: Yeah, that makes sense. I'm more of a sedan guy myself.
ParticipantB: Really? Why is that?
ParticipantA: I don't know, I just like the convenience of a smaller car. Plus, I live in the city so I don't really need a lot of space.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I can see that. What kind of sedan are you thinking of getting?
ParticipantA: I've been looking at the Honda Civic. I like how fuel efficient it is and it has a good safety rating.
ParticipantB: That's a good choice. I've been looking at the Toyota Camry. I like the reliability of Toyota cars.
ParticipantA: Yeah, they make great cars. What are some of the things you're considering when deciding on a new car?
ParticipantB: Well, I want something that's reliable and has good fuel economy. I also want a car that's comfortable to drive.
ParticipantA: Those are all good points. I'm looking for something that's safe, fuel efficient, and has good tech features.
ParticipantB: It sounds like we're both looking for similar things in a car. What's your budget for buying a new car?
ParticipantA: I'm hoping to stay around $20,000.
ParticipantB: Same here. I want to make sure I can afford the payments without breaking the bank.
ParticipantA: Yeah, that's important. Well, it sounds like we both have similar requirements for a new car. Thanks for chatting with me!
ParticipantB: No problem, it was nice talking to you.
